title: viola limbarae
intro: Viola limbarae, also known as the Mountain pansy, is a species of flowering plant in the family Violaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Viola limbarae include its use as an antiseptic to treat wounds and its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
